certificateTrustHelp.macOS: HTTPS requires the Synclan certificate to be trusted. Export the certificate, import it into Keychain Access, set it to Always Trust, then restart Synclan before enabling HTTPS.
certificateTrustHelp.linux: HTTPS requires the Synclan certificate to be trusted. Export the certificate, import it into your system trust store, then restart Synclan before enabling HTTPS.
certificateTrustHelp.default: HTTPS requires the Synclan certificate to be trusted by your operating system. Export the certificate, add it to the trusted certificates, then restart Synclan before enabling HTTPS.

updater.checkFailedDescription: Please check your network connection and try again.
